title: Internal Error V3Scope.cpp:359 for recursive constant function in $unit scope

features.name: recursive_constant_function_at_unit_scope
features.description: Code should include a recursive function defined at $unit scope (file scope outside any module) where the function calls itself within its own body

features.name: constant_evaluation_of_unit_scope_recursive_function
features.description: Code should include a recursive function at $unit scope being evaluated in a constant expression context such as localparam
